mapper.sql: id, analysis_job_id, run_id, criterion_id, stage, axis, severity, confidence, priority_score, evidence_level, CAST(evidence_refs_jsonb AS TEXT) AS evidence_refs_jsonb, CAST(observations_jsonb AS TEXT) AS observations_jsonb, CAST(signals_jsonb AS TEXT) AS signals_jsonb, CAST(exceptions_jsonb AS TEXT) AS exceptions_jsonb, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM rule_hit WHERE analysis_job_id = #{analysisJobId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_hit ( id, analysis_job_id, run_id, criterion_id, stage, axis, severity, confidence, priority_score, evidence_level, evidence_refs_jsonb, observations_jsonb, signals_jsonb, exceptions_jsonb ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{analysisJobId}, #{runId}, #{criterionId}, #{stage}, #{axis}, #{severity}, #{confidence}, #{priorityScore}, #{evidenceLevel}, CAST(#{evidenceRefsJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{observationsJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{signalsJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{exceptionsJsonb} AS jsonb) )
